kicker.zh: 面向中日韩的 Lossless Claw 改进版

summary.en: A community fork of Lossless Claw that fixes CJK token estimation and common session bugs, so Chinese, Japanese, and Korean users get accurate compaction.
summary.zh: Lossless Claw 的社区改进版，修正了中日韩文本的 token 估算偏差，以及若干会话 bug，让 CJK 用户也能得到准确的压缩。

en: The upstream Lossless Claw plugin uses English-biased token estimation, which underestimates Chinese, Japanese, and Korean character costs by roughly 2-4x. In practice that makes compaction fire at the wrong moment and causes context windows to overflow without warning.

Lossless Claw Enhanced is a fork that corrects the CJK mapping (closer to 1.5 tokens per character) and cherry-picks a set of upstream fixes around authentication errors, session rotation, and empty message accumulation. It is the more practical choice whenever the conversation is CJK-heavy and you still want the DAG-based lossless context model.
zh: 上游的 Lossless Claw 使用偏向英文的 token 估算，中日韩文本会被低估 2-4 倍，结果就是压缩触发时机错位、上下文窗口在没有警告的情况下溢出。
Lossless Claw Enhanced 这个 fork 修正了 CJK 字符的 token 估算（更接近 1.5 token/字），并挑选了一批上游的修复，覆盖鉴权错误、会话轮换、空消息累积等问题。只要会话里中日韩占比高，又想继续用 DAG 无损上下文的思路，它是更实际的选择。

en: CJK token estimation corrected from ~0.25 to ~1.5 tokens per character.
Cherry-picked fixes for authentication errors, session rotation, and empty message accumulation.
Drop-in replacement that keeps the DAG-based lossless context model from the upstream plugin.
zh: 中日韩字符的 token 估算从约 0.25 修正为约 1.5。
挑选合并了上游的鉴权错误、会话轮换、空消息累积等修复。
可直接替换上游插件，仍保持 DAG 的无损上下文模型。
